title: Give Max access to Meeting Notes database in Notion and wire it up as a new surface
narrative: Jeremy wants to grant Max access to his Meeting Notes database in Notion and have Max check it alongside the PA Tracker, Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and HubSpot. Two-part scope: (1) share the Notion Meeting Notes database with the integration used by the Notion MCP connector; (2) update CLAUDE.md / prompts so Max routinely queries the Meeting Notes DB as part of catch-ups, prep, and obligation extraction. Due early next week — target Monday 4/20.

title: Give Max a path to read personal email
narrative: Jeremy wants Max to have visibility into his personal email in addition to jeremy@sidecarcapitalpartners.com (the only account wired into the Gmail MCP connector today). Options to evaluate: (1) stand up a 'Personal Email Summary' Notion database that Jeremy forwards / pastes into — Max reads it the same way we read PA Tracker and (pending) Meeting Notes; (2) auto-forward personal mail into the business inbox under a dedicated label Max filters on during scans; (3) wait for multi-account Gmail MCP support and add the personal account as a second connector; (4) some hybrid. Flagged 'medium emergency' — early next week, target Monday 4/20. Pick the approach, then Max helps set up whichever path Jeremy chooses.
